description: Convert raw EDC demographic records to CDISC SDTM DM domain format.

cases.task_description: Convert this raw EDC record to a valid SDTM DM domain record. Output a JSON object with only these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY.
cases.study_context:
STUDY: CDISCPILOT01 — Type 2 Diabetes Phase 2 Trial

CDISC SDTM DM DOMAIN RULES:
- USUBJID = STUDYID + "-" + SITEID + "-" + SUBJID
- AGE = integer (years at consent)
- SEX: CDISC CT — "M" (Male) or "F" (Female)
- RACE: CDISC CT — "WHITE", "BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN", "ASIAN", "AMERICAN INDIAN OR ALASKA NATIVE", "NATIVE HAWAIIAN OR OTHER PACIFIC ISLANDER"
- RFSTDTC = ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD (date of first study treatment)
- COUNTRY = ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code (e.g., "USA", "GBR", "DEU", "FRA", "CAN")

cases.study_context:
STUDY: CDISCPILOT01 — Type 2 Diabetes Phase 2 Trial

CDISC SDTM DM DOMAIN RULES:
- USUBJID = STUDYID + "-" + SITEID + "-" + SUBJID
- AGE = integer (years at consent)
- SEX: CDISC CT — "M" (Male) or "F" (Female)
- RACE: CDISC CT — "WHITE", "BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN", "ASIAN", "AMERICAN INDIAN OR ALASKA NATIVE", "NATIVE HAWAIIAN OR OTHER PACIFIC ISLANDER"
- RFSTDTC = ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD (date of first study treatment)

cases.task_description: Convert this raw EDC record to a valid SDTM DM domain record. Output a JSON object with only these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY.
cases.study_context:
STUDY: CDISCPILOT01 — Type 2 Diabetes Phase 2 Trial

CDISC SDTM DM DOMAIN RULES:
- USUBJID = STUDYID + "-" + SITEID + "-" + SUBJID
- AGE = integer (years at consent)
- SEX: CDISC CT — "M" (Male) or "F" (Female)
- RACE: CDISC CT — "WHITE", "BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN", "ASIAN", "AMERICAN INDIAN OR ALASKA NATIVE", "NATIVE HAWAIIAN OR OTHER PACIFIC ISLANDER", "OTHER", "UNKNOWN"
- RFSTDTC = ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD (date of first study treatment)
- COUNTRY = ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code

SPONSOR NOTE ON RACE CODING: "Hispanic or Latino" is an ETHNICITY (ETHNIC domain), NOT a valid RACE term in CDISC SDTM. If a subject self-identifies only as Hispanic/Latino without specifying a racial group, the RACE field must be coded as "UNKNOWN" per sponsor ICD v2.1.

cases.task_description: Convert this raw EDC record to a valid SDTM DM domain record. Output a JSON object with only these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY.
cases.study_context:
STUDY: CDISCPILOT01 — Type 2 Diabetes Phase 2 Trial

CDISC SDTM DM DOMAIN RULES:
- USUBJID = STUDYID + "-" + SITEID + "-" + SUBJID
- AGE = integer (years at consent)
- SEX: CDISC CT — "M" (Male) or "F" (Female)
- RACE: CDISC CT — "WHITE", "BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN", "ASIAN", "AMERICAN INDIAN OR ALASKA NATIVE", "NATIVE HAWAIIAN OR OTHER PACIFIC ISLANDER", "OTHER", "UNKNOWN"
- RFSTDTC = ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD
- COUNTRY = ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code

CRITICAL DATE RULE: RFSTDTC must be the date of FIRST INVESTIGATIONAL PRODUCT ADMINISTRATION (field: first_dose_date). The consent_date is the date of informed consent and must NOT be used as RFSTDTC.

SPONSOR NOTE ON RACE CODING: "Two or more races" is NOT a valid CDISC CT RACE term. Map to "OTHER".

input_data.race: Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander

ground_truth.RACE: NATIVE HAWAIIAN OR OTHER PACIFIC ISLANDER

cases.task_description: Convert this raw EDC record to a valid SDTM DM domain record. Output a JSON object with only these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY.
cases.study_context:
STUDY: CDISCPILOT01 — Type 2 Diabetes Phase 2 Trial

CDISC SDTM DM DOMAIN RULES:
- USUBJID = STUDYID + "-" + SITEID + "-" + SUBJID
- AGE = integer (years at consent)
- SEX: CDISC CT — "M" (Male) or "F" (Female)
- RACE: CDISC CT — "WHITE", "BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN", "ASIAN", "AMERICAN INDIAN OR ALASKA NATIVE", "NATIVE HAWAIIAN OR OTHER PACIFIC ISLANDER", "OTHER", "UNKNOWN"
- RFSTDTC = ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD
- COUNTRY = ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code

CRITICAL DATE RULE: RFSTDTC must be the date of FIRST INVESTIGATIONAL PRODUCT ADMINISTRATION (field: ip_admin_date). The screening_date is the date of the screening visit and must NOT be used as RFSTDTC.

SPONSOR NOTE ON RACE CODING: "Multiracial" is NOT a valid CDISC CT RACE term. Map to "OTHER". Japan site IDs are 06.
